_email_deliverability_note: from=onboarding@resend.dev is Resend's SANDBOX sender: spam-prone and only delivers to your own verified address. For reliable inbox delivery, verify a sending domain in Resend (DKIM/SPF/DMARC) and set `from` to an address on it (env: MAIL_FROM). Until then, add a Gmail filter to never mark these as spam. See README 'Email deliverability'.
